prompt: The program throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when no arguments are provided. What is the bug?
choices: args is null when no arguments are provided
args[0] throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when args is empty; the code does not check args.length before accessing the first element
main must declare throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException to handle this case
args.length returns -1 when no arguments are passed
explanation: When no command-line arguments are passed, args is an empty array (length 0), not null. Accessing args[0] on an empty array throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. Fix: check if (args.length > 0) before accessing args[0].
